events.text: Goal!  Uruguay 1, Portugal 0. Edinson Cavani (Uruguay) header from the right side of the six yard box to the top right corner. Assisted by Luis Suárez with a cross.
Goal!  Uruguay 1, Portugal 1. Pepe (Portugal) header from the centre of the box to the bottom left corner. Assisted by Raphaël Guerreiro with a cross   following a corner.
Goal!  Uruguay 2, Portugal 1. Edinson Cavani (Uruguay) right footed shot from the left side of the box to the bottom right corner. Assisted by Rodrigo Bentancur.
Cristiano Ronaldo (Portugal) is shown the yellow card.
